title: Spec / goals
description: Business outcomes the site should produce. Drives IA, CTAs, success metrics. Distinct from features in scope.yaml — goals are outcomes, scope is what we build.

description.description: What outcome this goal represents (e.g. "30% více kvalifikovaných leadů ze sektoru průmyslové automatizace").

priority.description: MoSCoW priority. "wont" is allowed so the spec can record discussed-and-rejected goals.

kpi.description: Measurable indicator if one exists (e.g. "≥ 10 form submits / month po 3 měsících").

success_criteria.description: Concrete checks that would let us say "the site is doing its job" 3-6 months after launch.

anti_goals.description: Outcomes this site explicitly is NOT trying to achieve. Helps prevent scope creep (e.g. "není to e-shop", "není to nábor").
